release_notes: V14.44 build 216 beta adds Insulin total today and Last insulin with local dose time to Web UI Current status and the Insulin activity section. The existing IOB now and COB now values remain visible, and the insulin section now clearly explains that the daily total is the sum of recorded insulin entries since local midnight rather than the amount still active. All Build 215 Web UI, trend, sensor and local-address improvements, Build 214 leah.local default, Build 212 native OTA safeguards and existing Nightscout, SAGE, alarm and WhatsApp functions are preserved.
